disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning, stinging pain on passing urine
trigger_question_examples: What does it feel like when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It stings and burns really badly every single time I try to wee — it's the worst part.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urinary frequency and urgency, passing only small volumes
trigger_question_examples: How often are you going to the toilet?
How much are you passing each time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm running to the toilet every few minutes but hardly anything comes out each time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull suprapubic (lower abdominal) ache and a sensation of incomplete emptying
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pain in your tummy?
Do you feel like you empty your bladder fully?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache low down in my belly and it never feels like I've properly emptied.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cloudy, foul-smelling urine with visible blood over the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: What does your urine look or smell like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's gone cloudy and smells awful, and in the last few hours there's been blood — the bowl goes pink.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began shortly after sexual intercourse
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on not long after I had sex, if that matters.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not go into that, but yes, around then.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fevers, no shaking chills or rigors
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or shaking chills?
Have you felt hot and shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had a fever or the shakes — just the burning and needing to go all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pain in the back or side (loin/flank)
trigger_question_examples: Any pain in your back or the sides of your lower back?
Does your loin or the area over your kidneys hurt?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my back and sides feel fine — it's all down low at the front.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No nausea or vomiting; keeping fluids down
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel sick or have you been vomiting?
Are you able to keep fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not sick in the stomach — I can still drink okay.
